# synARKa Intelligence
> The Indo-Pacific Sovereign Sense Engine. Multi-engine consensus intelligence across critical minerals, rare earths, geopolitics, defence, logistics, infrastructure, national resources and markets — 72 hours before it becomes the headline. Sydney, Australia. Operating entity Artigellence Augmentation Aggregator, ABN 83 988 690 362, active since 2003.

## What synARKa is
- Calibrated, timestamped, falsifiable insights — "insight", never "prediction" (ACMA compliance, Australia)
- Three engines: Satellite (brokered SAR/LWIR tasking, NDA-tier providers) · Predictive-Simulation · Intelligence (multi-engine consensus across 8 reasoning engines)
- Four stages: SENSE → SIMULATE → VERIFY → DELIVER
- Public resolved ledger with misses reported in full: 5 of 6 May-2026 insights resolved correct
- Phase 2 (in active build, NOT live today): automated SHA-256 hashing, OpenTimestamps anchoring, Brier scoring, psychometric agent swarms

## Entry ladder
- 72-Hour Brief — A$500, one corridor question
- Site Baseline Audit — A$3,500–7,500 one-time, credits toward SiteWatch
- SiteWatch — from A$1,490/mo per site, continuous monitoring on an audited asset
- Sovereign Retainer — eight protocols from Free to Consultancy

- https://synarka.pro — main engine
- https://insights.synarka.pro — the resolved insights ledger (proof object)

## Honesty discipline
Research & educational content only. Not financial, legal or investment advice. synARKa Intelligence is not an AFS licensee. A ledger that hides its misses is not a ledger.
